argument.script: (async () => { const res = await fetch('https://api.bilibili.com/x/polymer/web-dynamic/v1/feed/all', { credentials: 'include' }); const data = await res.json(); const items = data?.data?.items || []; return items.slice(0, {{ limit }}).map(item => { let text = ''; if (item.modules?.module_dynamic?.desc?.text) { text = item.modules.module_dynamic.desc.text; } else if (item.modules?.module_dynamic?.major?.archive?.title) { text = item.modules.module_dynamic.major.archive.title; } return { id: item.id_str || '', author: item.modules?.module_author?.name || '', text: text, likes: item.modules?.module_stat?.like?.count || 0, url: item.id_str ? 'https://t.bilibili.com/' + item.id_str : '' }; }); })()
